name: Iconosquare
description:
Iconosquare is designed for businesses, brands, and agencies looking to go deep. In-depth analytics, management tools, and insights across social platforms make the tool a secret weapon for social media teams across the globe. 

Key Features

  • Advanced analytics are the platform’s calling card. Users enjoy detailed insights into follower demographics, engagement rates, best posting times, and content performance.
  • Competitor tracking allows users to compare their performance against competitors to benchmark and strategize accordingly.
  • The platform’s customizable dashboards mean that users can tailor their analytics dashboard to focus on the metrics that align with their goals.
  • Scheduled publishing lets users plan and schedule their content in advance across platforms. 
  • Instagram stories analytics enable users to track the performance of their stories, lending understanding into how they contribute to overall engagement and reach.
  • Hashtag tracking lets users analyze the effectiveness of hashtags in terms of reach and engagement.

Usability

Iconosquare’s sleek, user-friendly interface makes navigation and data analysis as easy as pie. The platform is designed to simplify complex data, making it accessible and actionable with clear graphs, charts, and insights.

Platform Compatibility

  • Instagram 
  • Facebook 
  • Twitter

Iconosquare Pricing

  • Pro Plan: Starting at $49 per month, the plan is designed for professional marketers and small businesses.
  • Advanced Plan: Starting at $79 per month, the advanced plan offers more features like competitor tracking and custom dashboards.
  • Agency Plan: With custom pricing, the agency plan provides solutions for agencies with multiple clients and larger teams.

Customer Support

Iconosquare is committed to providing users with helpful and timely assistance, offering support via email. The platform also includes a rich knowledge base that includes tutorials, FAQs, and resources.

Power Users

  • Marketers and businesses who want to deepen their understanding of social media analytics and build strategies that set their brands up for success.
  • Social media managers who need to schedule posts efficiently and track their performance.
  • Agencies that want in-depth analytics and reporting features to provide detailed insights and recommendations to clients.

Additional Features on Iconosquare

  • Custom reporting makes it easy for users to share insights with clients or stakeholders.
  • Comment tracking lets users manage and reply to comments on their accounts directly from Iconosquare.
  • Profile activity monitors the growth and activity on user profiles, including new follows/unfollows, to better understand audience behavior.

Iconosquare’s specialty is detailed analytics, making it an essential tool for any social media marketer looking to dive deeper into strategy.

‍
